qa_tool: manual operator QA via Next build and Playwright smoke
summary: Build passed, but Playwright smoke QA failed because the app server at http://localhost:3000 did not become ready within 90 seconds during global setup.
notes: Playwright global setup failed waiting for http://localhost:3000. The failure message instructed starting the app with 'npm run dev' before rerunning Playwright. Baseline-browser-mapping and Browserslist messages were warnings only and did not fail the build.
